findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_project_context" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Captures the user's project architecture to inform i18n implementation strategy. ## When to Use **Called during i18n_checklist Step 1.** The checklist tool will…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
